mnemonics.title: Deadlock Conditions
mnemonics.content: My Hungry Neighbor Cooks Pizza (Mutual Exclusion, Hold & Wait, No Preemption, Circular Wait)

acronyms.expansion: Operating System Technique for Resource Ignorance and Convenient Handling

visualTips.visualization: Draw circles (processes) connected to squares (resources) with request/allocation edges

analogies.analogy: Four cars at 4-way stop each waiting for others to move first
